name: Black Bean Tacos
description: Lightly refried black beans with aromatic veggies and spices in warm corn tortillas. Based on the highly rated Love & Lemons recipe.

ingredients.name: plain Greek yogurt or sour cream

steps: Reserve ½ cup of liquid from one can of black beans, then drain and rinse both cans.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, jalapeño, garlic, and salt. Cook stirring occasionally for 8 minutes until softened.
Stir in taco seasoning and cook 1 minute. Add beans and ¼ cup of the reserved bean liquid. Cook 5–8 minutes until thick, mashing some beans with the back of a spoon.
Warm tortillas directly over a gas burner 30 seconds per side, or in a dry skillet.
Mix Greek yogurt with lime juice to make a quick crema. Assemble tacos with bean filling, cabbage, avocado, crema, and cilantro.

proteins.name: Skirt steak strips
proteins.instructions: Season with salt, pepper, and cumin. Cook in a hot cast iron skillet 2–3 min per side. Rest 5 min then slice thin against the grain.

proteins.name: Chicken thighs (boneless)
proteins.instructions: Pound thin. Season with taco seasoning. Cook in oiled skillet over medium-high 4–5 min per side.

proteins.name: Shrimp (large, peeled)
proteins.instructions: Toss with chili powder, cumin, salt. Cook in hot skillet 1–2 min per side until pink.

name: Veggie Burrito Bowls
description: Fajita-spiced peppers and onions over rice with pinto beans and all your favorite toppings. A complete weeknight bowl.

ingredients.name: pinto beans (15oz can), drained and rinsed
bell peppers (red, yellow, or orange), sliced
fresh salsa or pico de gallo

steps: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add peppers and onion with fajita seasoning. Cook 7–8 minutes tossing occasionally until softened and lightly charred.
Warm beans in a small saucepan over medium heat with a splash of water and a pinch of salt, 4–5 minutes.
Cook rice packets in microwave per package directions (usually 90 seconds).
Build bowls: rice base, then peppers and onions, beans, cheese, salsa, avocado, and sour cream. Finish with lime juice.

proteins.name: Chicken breast (sliced)
proteins.instructions: Slice thin. Toss with fajita seasoning. Cook in same skillet as peppers 6–7 min. Remove before cooking veg, or cook alongside.

proteins.name: Ground beef 80/20
proteins.instructions: Brown in a separate skillet over medium-high, breaking up, 8–10 min. Drain fat. Season with 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp chili powder.

proteins.name: Chorizo (Mexican-style)
proteins.instructions: Remove casing. Brown in skillet over medium 7–8 min, breaking up. Drain excess fat.

name: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a rich, spiced tomato and bell pepper sauce. Based on the widely praised Kitchn recipe with 14oz crushed tomatoes and harissa.

ingredients.name: medium red bell pepper, diced (about 1 cup)
fresh cilantro or flat-leaf parsley, chopped
pita or crusty bread, for serving

steps: Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium heat. Add onion and bell pepper and cook stirring occasionally 6–8 minutes until translucent and softened.
Add garlic, tomato paste, and harissa. Cook stirring until tomato paste darkens slightly, about 2 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes. Pour ¼ cup water into the empty can, swirl, and add to the skillet. Add lemon juice, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Simmer over medium-low, stirring often, for 15 minutes until sauce thickens.
Use a spoon to make 6 wells in the sauce. Crack one egg into each well. Cover and cook 4–8 minutes depending on how set you like the yolks.
Remove from heat. Top with feta, fresh herbs, and extra red pepper flakes if desired. Serve immediately with pita.

proteins.name: Merguez sausage
proteins.instructions: Slice into rounds. Brown in a separate pan 5–6 min. Add directly to your bowl on top of the shakshuka.

proteins.name: Ground lamb
proteins.instructions: Brown in separate pan with a pinch of cumin and salt 7–8 min. Spoon onto your portion before adding eggs to the sauce, or serve alongside.

proteins.name: Halloumi (pan-fried)
proteins.instructions: Slice ¼-inch thick. Cook in a dry nonstick skillet 1–2 min per side until golden. Lay over the top of your portion.

name: Greek Grain Bowl
description: Nutty farro with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, kalamata olives, and feta in a bright lemon-herb dressing.
steps: Cook farro packets per package directions (usually 10 minutes in boiling water). Drain and spread out briefly to cool.
While farro cooks, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, garlic, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
Add farro to the dressing bowl and toss. Add tomatoes, cucumber, olives, roasted peppers, and parsley. Toss again.
Divide into bowls and top generously with crumbled feta. Serve warm or at room temperature.

proteins.name: Chicken thighs (boneless)
proteins.instructions: Season with salt, pepper, and oregano. Cook in oiled skillet over medium-high 5–6 min per side. Rest 5 min, slice, and lay over your bowl.

proteins.name: Lamb loin chops
proteins.instructions: Season with salt, pepper, garlic powder. Cook in a hot cast iron 3–4 min per side for medium. Rest before slicing.

proteins.name: Shrimp (large, peeled)
proteins.instructions: Toss with olive oil, oregano, lemon zest, salt, pepper. Sear in hot skillet 1–2 min per side.

name: Pasta e Fagioli
description: Classic Italian soup with two types of beans, small pasta, crushed tomatoes, and Parmesan. Based on the Cookie & Kate and Love & Lemons recipes with 250+ five-star reviews.

ingredients.name: ditalini or small shell pasta, dry
cannellini beans (15oz can), drained and rinsed
Parmesan rind (from a block) + more grated to serve

steps: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion, carrots, celery, and ½ tsp salt. Cook stirring often 6–8 minutes until soft.
Add garlic, rosemary, oregano, and red pepper flakes. Stir 1 minute until fragrant.
Add crushed tomatoes and stir. Add beans, broth, Parmesan rind, remaining salt, and several grinds of black pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Cook 10 minutes. Scoop out 1½ cups of soup (avoiding the Parmesan rind), blend until smooth, and stir back in for a creamy texture.
Add dry pasta and simmer 10 more minutes until al dente. Remove Parmesan rind. Stir in parsley. Taste and adjust salt.
Serve with grated Parmesan and a drizzle of olive oil. Note: pasta absorbs broth as leftovers sit — add a splash of broth when reheating.

proteins.name: Italian sausage links
proteins.instructions: Slice into rounds. Brown in a separate skillet over medium 7–8 min. Serve alongside or spoon onto your bowl.

proteins.name: Pancetta, diced
proteins.instructions: Cook in a small skillet over medium until crispy, 6–7 min. Drain on paper towels. Crumble over your bowl at the end.

proteins.name: Ground beef 80/20
proteins.instructions: Brown in a separate pan with a pinch of oregano and salt, 8–10 min. Drain fat. Spoon onto your bowl.

name: Zucchini Aglio e Olio
description: The classic Roman pasta — spaghetti in garlic-infused olive oil with crispy golden zucchini, lemon zest, and Parmesan. Simple, elegant, and fast.

ingredients.name: medium zucchini, sliced into thin rounds

steps: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Salt generously (1 tbsp). Cook spaghetti 1 minute less than package directions. Reserve 1½ cups pasta water before draining.

While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium. Add sliced garlic and cook slowly 3–4 minutes until golden (not brown). Add red pepper flakes and cook 30 seconds. Remove garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside.
Raise heat to medium-high. Add zucchini slices in a single layer with a pinch of salt. Cook undisturbed 2 minutes per side until golden. Work in batches if needed.
Add drained pasta to the skillet. Add ½ cup pasta water and toss vigorously to emulsify the oil and water into a glossy sauce. Add more pasta water as needed.
Remove from heat. Add lemon zest, lemon juice, Parmesan, and parsley. Toss to coat. Top with the reserved golden garlic. Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

proteins.name: Large shrimp (peeled, deveined)
proteins.instructions: Season with salt, pepper, lemon zest. Cook in a separate pan in butter and garlic 1–2 min per side. Pile on top of your portion.

proteins.name: Chicken breast (thin-cut or pounded)
proteins.instructions: Season with salt, pepper. Cook in oiled skillet over medium-high 3–4 min per side until golden. Slice and lay over your bowl.

proteins.name: Italian sausage (removed from casing)
proteins.instructions: Brown and crumble in a separate skillet over medium, 7–8 min. Drain and spoon onto your portion.

name: Thai Peanut Noodles
description: Rice noodles tossed in a creamy, sweet-spicy peanut sauce with shredded carrots, cucumber, and edamame. Based on the widely loved Nora Cooks recipe.

ingredients.name: English cucumber, julienned or thinly sliced

steps: Cook rice noodles according to package directions. Drain and rinse well under cold water to prevent sticking. Toss with ½ tsp sesame oil while still warm.
Whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, rice vinegar, honey, sriracha, garlic, and sesame oil in a bowl until smooth. If the sauce is too thick, add 1–2 tbsp warm water.
Add noodles to a large bowl with edamame, cucumber, carrots, and green onions. Pour peanut sauce over and toss to coat evenly.
Divide into bowls. Top with chopped peanuts, sesame seeds, and cilantro. Serve with extra lime wedges and sriracha on the side.

proteins.name: Chicken breast, sliced thin
proteins.instructions: Poach in barely simmering salted water 12 min, or pan-sear in oil 3–4 min per side over medium-high. Shred or slice and fan over your bowl.

proteins.name: Large shrimp (peeled)
proteins.instructions: Toss with a little sesame oil, salt, pinch of red pepper. Sear in hot skillet 1–2 min per side. Lay on top of your bowl.

proteins.name: Ground pork
proteins.instructions: Brown in skillet over medium-high 7–8 min, breaking up. Season with 1 tbsp soy sauce, pinch of ginger. Spoon onto your bowl.

name: Garlic Noodle Stir-Fry
description: Lo mein noodles with bok choy in a punchy soy-garlic-oyster sauce. High heat, fast cook, big flavor.
steps: Cook noodles per package directions, 1 minute less than directed. Drain and toss with ½ tsp sesame oil. Set aside.
Mix together soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl. Set the sauce aside.
Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat until smoking hot. Add vegetable oil. Add garlic and ginger and stir-fry 30 seconds.
Add bok choy cut-side down and cook undisturbed 2 minutes. Flip and cook another 1 minute. Push to the side.
Add noodles to the center of the pan. Pour sauce over and toss everything together on high heat for 1–2 minutes. Add green onions, toss once more.
Plate and top with sesame seeds. Serve immediately.

proteins.name: Flank or skirt steak, thin-sliced against grain
proteins.instructions: Marinate 5 min in 1 tbsp soy sauce + 1 tsp sesame oil. Sear in a separate hot skillet 2–3 min per side. Slice thin and lay over your bowl.

proteins.name: Chicken thighs (boneless), sliced thin
proteins.instructions: Cook in hot oiled skillet over medium-high 6–7 min tossing. Season with soy sauce and a splash of sesame oil.

proteins.name: Extra-firm tofu, pressed and cubed
proteins.instructions: Pat very dry. Fry in 2 tbsp oil over medium-high 4–5 min per side until golden. Add to the stir-fry.

name: Miso Soup & Rice Bowl
description: Umami-rich miso broth with silken tofu and wakame over steamed rice. One of the fastest warming meals in the rotation.

ingredients.name: low-sodium vegetable broth or dashi broth

steps: Soak dried wakame in cold water for 5 minutes. Drain and squeeze out excess water. Set aside.
Heat broth in a medium saucepan over medium heat until steaming but not boiling. Remove from heat.

In a small bowl, whisk miso paste with a ladleful of hot broth until completely dissolved. Stir back into the pot. Do not boil after adding miso — it kills the probiotic cultures and changes the flavor.
Gently add tofu cubes and wakame. Warm 2 minutes over low heat.
Heat rice packets per package directions. Divide rice into bowls, ladle miso soup alongside or over the rice. Top with green onions, nori strips, sesame seeds, and a drizzle of sesame oil.

proteins.name: Salmon fillet
proteins.instructions: Pat dry. Season skin-side with salt. Cook skin-side down in oiled skillet over medium-high 4–5 min until crispy. Flip and cook 2–3 min more. Lay over rice.

proteins.name: Teriyaki chicken thighs
proteins.instructions: Brush with 2 tbsp teriyaki sauce. Cook in oiled skillet over medium 5–6 min per side until cooked through. Slice and fan over your bowl.

proteins.name: Pork tenderloin, thin-sliced
proteins.instructions: Slice ½-inch thick. Season with soy sauce, ginger, and a pinch of sugar. Sear in hot skillet 2 min per side.

name: Three-Bean Veggie Chili
description: A hearty three-bean chili with chipotle, fire-roasted tomatoes, and smoky spices. Genuinely satisfying without meat.

ingredients.name: black beans (15oz can), drained and rinsed
kidney beans (15oz can), drained and rinsed
pinto beans (15oz can), drained and rinsed
chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, minced
fresh cilantro and lime, for topping

steps: Heat olive oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion and a pinch of salt. Cook 4–5 minutes until softened.
Add garlic, chipotle peppers, chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and oregano. Stir 1–2 minutes until fragrant and darkened.
Add all three cans of beans, crushed tomatoes, and broth. Stir to combine. Bring to a simmer.
Cook uncovered over medium-low for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Use the back of a spoon to mash a portion of the beans against the pot wall for thicker texture.
Taste and adjust salt, chipotle, and spices. Serve topped with cheddar, sour cream, and cilantro.

proteins.name: Ground beef 80/20
proteins.instructions: Brown in a separate skillet over medium-high, breaking up, 8–10 min. Drain fat. Season with 1 tsp chili powder + salt. Spoon into your bowl on top.

proteins.name: Ground turkey
proteins.instructions: Cook in separate skillet over medium 8–10 min, breaking up and seasoning with chili powder, cumin, and salt. Drain any liquid.

proteins.name: Bison (ground)
proteins.instructions: Brown in separate skillet 7–8 min with a pinch of chili powder and salt. Leaner than beef — don't overcook.

name: Loaded Baked Potato Bar
description: Microwave baked potatoes with a full toppings bar. One of the fastest meals in the rotation with near-zero active cook time.
steps: Scrub potatoes and pierce all over with a fork (at least 8 times each). Place on a microwave-safe plate.

Microwave on high: 1 potato = 5 minutes; 2 potatoes = 8–10 minutes; 4 potatoes = 14–16 minutes. Flip halfway. Test with a knife — it should slide in easily. (Alternatively, bake at 450°F for 45–50 min for crispy skin.)
While potatoes cook, microwave broccoli steam-bag per package directions (usually 3–4 minutes).
Carefully cut each potato open lengthwise. Push ends toward center to open. Add butter, season with salt and pepper.
Set out all toppings: cheese, sour cream, broccoli, green onions, and hot sauce. Everyone builds their own.

proteins.name: Rotisserie chicken (pre-cooked)
proteins.instructions: Zero cook time. Shred and warm in a bowl in the microwave 90 seconds with a splash of chicken broth. Pile on top.

proteins.name: Bacon strips
proteins.instructions: Cook in a cold skillet over medium heat 7–8 min, flipping once. Drain on paper towels. Crumble over the potato.

proteins.name: Chili topping (leftover veggie chili)
proteins.instructions: Reheat leftover chili in a saucepan 4–5 min or microwave 2 min. Ladle over the split potato.

name: Mediterranean Flatbread Pizzas
description: Crispy naan topped with hummus, roasted vegetables, and feta. Ready in the time it takes to heat an oven.
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F. Place naan on a baking sheet.
Spread hummus evenly over each naan, leaving a small border. Layer with spinach, cherry tomatoes, roasted peppers, and olives.
Top with crumbled feta. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with oregano and red pepper flakes.
Bake 10–12 minutes until the edges are golden and crispy and the feta is slightly golden.
Remove from oven. Finish with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice and torn fresh basil or parsley.

proteins.name: Rotisserie chicken (shredded)
proteins.instructions: Scatter shredded chicken over the hummus before adding vegetables. It heats through during the 10-12 min bake.

proteins.name: Gyro-style beef or lamb strips
proteins.instructions: Slice thin. Season with cumin, oregano, garlic powder, salt. Sear in hot skillet 3–4 min. Arrange on your naan after baking.

proteins.name: Merguez sausage, sliced
proteins.instructions: Brown slices in skillet 4–5 min. Scatter over your flatbread after baking.
